Officially classified under the heavy-industry umbrella of 'Rail, Ship, Aerospace and Other Transport Equipment Manufacturing' and specifically tagged as 'Urban Rail Transit Equipment Manufacturing' (e.g., subway cars/trains), the physical reality immediately shatters this classification. Combined with 'Ship Design' and 'Software Development', this entity is conclusively diagnosed as a 2-Person Marine Tech and Ship Management Agency.
